title: Looking for Category Manager at Delhivery

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Delhivery
jsonLd.description:
Delhivery invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
